temporal_description:
The scene opens with a medium close-up on an older man with short, graying hair. He is wearing a light-colored suit jacket over a light blue collared shirt and a dark tie. He looks down with a serious and contemplative expression. To his left, a younger man with dark hair, wearing a dark, patterned shirt, is partially visible, looking on. The setting is a dimly lit interior with a cool, greenish-blue color palette. In the background, another man in a dark suit is out of focus. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The camera is steady, focusing on the older man's face and upper body. The audio opens with a man speaking in a calm, authoritative voice, giving a short, direct command in Chinese. His tone is firm and slightly impatient, as if he's addressing subordinates in a serious situation. In the background, a low, tense, and slightly ominous ambient score plays, creating a suspenseful and serious atmosphere.

The camera angle shifts slightly, showing more of the older man as he begins to speak and gesture with his right hand. The younger man to his left remains in the frame, looking forward. The background is a dark, cluttered room with framed pictures on the wall. The "风行网" watermark is still present. The camera remains relatively still, maintaining the medium close-up on the main subjects.

The camera pans to the left, revealing a wider view of the room. The older man is now on the right side of the frame, gesturing with his right hand towards a younger man on the left. This man, wearing a dark shirt, looks at the older man. In the background, another man in a dark suit stands near a doorway, observing the interaction. The room is dark and appears to be a bar or a private room, with chairs and a table visible. The "风行网" watermark is still visible. The camera pans smoothly from right to left, following the older man's gesture and revealing more of the group and the room's layout. Another man responds with a quick, affirmative "Oh," before the first man continues with another command, his voice remaining firm and decisive. The background music continues its low, pulsing rhythm, underscoring the gravity of the interaction.
